facebook.caption:
POV: you needed a break from seafood and found CƠM CHAY HIỀN ĐỨC on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.

4.9 stars. Vegetarian com chay on Phu Quoc. Most tourists walk straight past.

Fresh rice dishes, zero meat, full flavor. The kind of lunch that actually makes you feel good after.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch what a 4.9-star vegetarian lunch looks like on Phu Quoc. CƠM CHAY HIỀN ĐỨC on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is doing something different. Clean, simple, seriously good.
